query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collection_job_history (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  schedule_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  source_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('success', 'failure', 'running') NOT NULL,
  started_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT,
  evidence_collected INT DEFAULT 0,
  error_message TEXT,
  duration_ms INT
);

  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  schedule_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,

  status ENUM('success', 'failure', 'running') NOT NULL,
  started_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT,
  evidence_collected INT DEFAULT 0,
  error_message TEXT,
  duration_ms INT
